mapper.sql: coachEvaluatId, coachId, userId, privateClassId, className, headImgUrl, nickname, evLevel, evContent, evaluatImgUrl, evaluatDate
mapper.insert: insert into coach_evaluate (coachEvaluatId, coachId, userId, evLevel, evContent, evaluatImgUrl, evaluatDate) values (#{coachEvaluatId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{evLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{evContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evaluatImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evaluatDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into coach_evaluate
coachEvaluatId,
coachId,
privateClassId,
orderNo,
className,
headImgUrl,
nickname,
userId,
evLevel,
evContent,
evaluatImgUrl,
evaluatDate,
#{coachEvaluatId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{privateClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{evLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{evContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{evaluatImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{evaluatDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update coach_evaluate
coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
evLevel = #{evLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
evContent = #{evContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
evaluatImgUrl = #{evaluatImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
evaluatDate = #{evaluatDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where coachEvaluatId = #{coachEvaluatId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update coach_evaluate set coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, evLevel = #{evLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, evContent = #{evContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evaluatImgUrl = #{evaluatImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evaluatDate = #{evaluatDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where coachEvaluatId = #{coachEvaluatId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coach_evaluate ce LEFT JOIN user_info u ON u.userId = ce.userId LEFT JOIN private_class pc ON pc.privateClassId = ce.privateClassId WHERE ce.coachId = #{coachId}

SELECT u.nickname,u.headImgUrl,ce.evLevel,ce.evaluatDate,pc.className,ce.evContent,ce.evaluatImgUrl FROM coach_evaluate ce LEFT JOIN user_info u ON u.userId = ce.userId LEFT JOIN private_class pc ON pc.privateClassId = ce.privateClassId WHERE ce.coachId = #{coachId} ORDER BY ce.evaluatDate DESC
limit #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coach_evaluate ce LEFT JOIN user_info u ON u.userId = ce.userId LEFT JOIN private_class pc ON pc.privateClassId = ce.privateClassId WHERE ce.coachId = #{coachId} ORDER BY ce.evaluatDate
